{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/6913191?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DeathsPirate/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DeathsPirate/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DeathsPirate/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DeathsPirate/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/DeathsPirate", "id": 6913191, "login": "DeathsPirate", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjY5MTMxOTE=", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DeathsPirate/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DeathsPirate/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DeathsPirate/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DeathsPirate/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DeathsPirate/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/DeathsPirate", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:L/VI:L/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-942", "name": "Permissive Cross-domain Security Policy with Untrusted Domains"}], "description": "### Summary

The TTS generation endpoint sets `Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *` as a hardcoded response header, independent of the server's CORS configuration. This enables any webpage to make cross-origin requests to generate speech using stored credentials.

### Root Cause

```typescript
// packages/server/src/controllers/text-to-speech/index.ts:83
res.setHeader('Access-Control-Allow-Origin', '*')
res.setHeader('Access-Control-Allow-Headers', 'Cache-Control')
```

### Impact

- Cross-origin credential abuse — any webpage can trigger TTS using stored credentials
- Bypasses the server's CORS policy (`getCorsOptions()`) which is otherwise restrictive by default
- Combined with Finding 3 (TTS credential abuse), enables drive-by credential abuse via malicious webpages

### Suggested Fix

Remove the hardcoded CORS wildcard and let the server's CORS middleware handle the headers:

```typescript
// Remove these lines:
// res.setHeader('Access-Control-Allow-Origin', '*')
// res.setHeader('Access-Control-Allow-Headers', 'Cache-Control')
```

---

## References

- `packages/server/src/controllers/text-to-speech/index.ts` line 83", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-m837-xvxr-vqwg", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-20T15:38:02Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-m837-xvxr-vqwg", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-m837-xvxr-vqwg"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-05-20T15:38:02Z", "references": ["https://github.com/FlowiseAI/Flowise/security/advisories/GHSA-m837-xvxr-vqwg", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-m837-xvxr-vqwg"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/FlowiseAI/Flowise/security-advisories/GHSA-m837-xvxr-vqwg", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/FlowiseAI/Flowise", "summary": "Flowise: Hardcoded CORS wildcard on TTS endpoint enables cross-origin credential abuse from any webpage", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-20T15:38:05Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-m837-xvxr-vqwg", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "3.1.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "flowise"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 3.1.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Flowise: Hardcoded CORS wildcard on TTS endpoint enables cross-origin credential abuse from any webpage
